### Cleaning applicator Gyeon Q2M ScrubPad EVO (8 x10 cm)
The Gyeon Q²M ScrubPad EVO is a double-sided cleaning tool for vehicle interiors. The white side is ideal for cleaning leather or removing built-up dirt on plastic trim. The black foam side effectively collects dust. Fully synthetic materials stay like new after many uses. The size and shape are suitable for cleaning intricately shaped elements or crevices in the interior of cars.

### Main features

- Double cleaning applicator for the interior.
- White/black color.
- Dimensions: 8 x 10 cm.
- Price for 1 pc.
- Made in South Korea.
### About the brand
The Gyeon brand (pronounced "jion") comes from South Korea, where several global brands dealing with high-quality and innovative car cosmetics were created. South Koreans are known to be very precise and hardworking, and these qualities are perfectly reflected in the products of this brand. Just by looking at the design of their products, it is obvious that they have taken care. But pretty packaging isn't everything. This car cosmetic offers advanced technologies at competitive prices. Gyeon develops and manufactures almost every product in its own laboratory and factory in South Korea with the help of the best scientists and experts in the field of car care. They support this process with in-depth research, intensive testing and an obsessive desire to improve everything they do. This approach results in exceptional products in terms of quality, durability and ease of use. Gyeon has always been unique and always strives to be one step ahead and is willing to win in every aspect of his business. Passion and experience keep them on this path. They never compromise. In Europe, this car cosmetic is very popular. Today, Gyeon is sold on 6 continents and in more than 100 countries around the world. | Catalog number | G37437
